pageContext.name: Ahsoka Tano
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Lladró are proud to present the Ahsoka Tano Porcelain Statue!  From Lladró's Star Wars Premier Collection, this statue has a matt porcelain finish with some metallic and iridescent effects. It stands at 22' tall and is decorated with the characteristic colors of the character. The non-porcelain elements are Ahsoka's white lightsabers, which are represented with two fluorescent glass rods of 7.87' and 11.81'. The black base included with the sculpture is made of wood.  Be sure to order your Ahsoka Tano Porcelain Statue today!
